topStories.description: The UN warns of significant global trade risks, including increased food prices and cost-of-living, if the Strait of Hormuz is closed due to escalating West Asia conflict.

topStories.title: Supreme Court allows withdrawal of life support to 31-year-old man in coma for over 12 years
topStories.description: J.B. Pardiwala and K.V. Viswanathan said the withdrawal of life support must not be a “single act” but a structured and clearly articulated withdrawal

topStories.title: Supreme Court approves passive euthanasia for 31-year-old man in coma for over 12 years
topStories.description: In a landmark decision, the Supreme Court has permitted passive euthanasia for Harish Rana, a 31-year-old man in a coma for over 12 years. The ruling emphasizes dignity in death and the importance of expert medical opinions in such sensitive cases.

topStories.title: Assam govt drops ex-President Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed's name from medical college in Barpeta
topStories.description: CM Himanta Biswa Sarma said all medical colleges im Assam are named after their locations, except for this; it does not align with our naming pattern

topStories.title: North Korea is latest to back Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei. Who else has- and who hasn't? Full list
topStories.description: North Korea has endorsed Iran's appointment of Mojtaba Khamenei as supreme leader and condemned US-Israeli strikes as ‘unlawful,’ whilst Kim Jong Un oversaw a fresh cruise missile test from Pyongyang's largest warship. Here's what it means for the widening conflict.
